output.question: create a portfolio of ather energy , coal india , bhel , sona blw , biocon to give me annualized return of 14%
output.findings:
Ather Energy launched its IPO from April 28, 2025, to April 30, 2025, at an issue price of ₹321.00 per share. It listed on the BSE and NSE on May 6, 2025, with a listing price of ₹328.00, representing a modest initial gain of 2.18%. As of late May 2026, the stock has shown significant appreciation, trading at approximately ₹950.60 per share.

The portfolio includes a mix of established public sector undertakings (Coal India, BHEL), pharmaceutical entities (Biocon), and automotive technology companies (Sona BLW, Ather Energy). Achieving a specific annualized return of 14% requires active asset allocation based on the varying risk-return profiles of these companies, ranging from mature, dividend-paying stocks like Coal India to high-growth, high-volatility sectors represented by Ather Energy and Sona BLW.
